data.title: Multi-factor Authentication
data.description: Protects user accounts with an additional layer of security.
data.technical_spec: Combines password and secondary verification method.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protective measures against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS Shield and other external DDoS protection services.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures data is encrypted both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 bit encryption standard is used.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular scanning and patching of vulnerabilities in all systems.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Access Control Policies
data.description: Strict access control policies to limit and audit data access.
